---
title: "Quarto Basics"
format:
  html:
    code-fold: true
jupyter: python3
---

```{mermaid}
flowchart 
   M(["Start"]) --> A["Total <- 0"]
   A --> B["counter <- 0"]
   B --> X(( )) 
   X --> C{Counter == 10}

   C --> |yes|E[/"OUTPUT "Finished""/]
   E --> Z("AvergeWeekTemp <- Total / 7")
   Z --> Y[/"OUTPUT "This week's average is:""/]
   Y --> V[/"OUTPUT averageWeeksTemp"/]
   V --> L(["END"])

   C --> |no|D[/"OUTPUT "Counter""/]
   D --> F[/"INPUT MaxTemperature"/]
   F --> G("Total <- Total + MaxTemperature")
   G --> H("NEXT Counter")
   H --> X
```
